name: Don't You Know Who I Work For?

conservative.name: Don't You Know Who I Work For?
conservative.requirements: Target must be able to hear you, the person you mention must be important (a big name)

success.description: You drop a name. A big name. This can be an employer or even an acquaintance. If appropriate, you influence the target. At the very least, you now have his full attention

boon.description: While this card is recharging you may add to all Social actions involving the target

chaosStar.description: Funny thing. Your target also knows the person, but they've never heard your name mentioned. If you use Guile for the check, gain the Rattled condition while this card is recharging

challenge.description: Special: This action may only be made against each individual target once per act. If you do not really know the subject of your name-drop, add to the check and use Guile (Fel) vs. Target Intuition (Int) instead.

reckless.name: Don't You Know Who I Work For?
reckless.requirements: Target must be able to hear you, the person you mention must be important (a big name)

success.description: You drop a name. A big name. This can be an employer or even an acquaintance. If appropriate, you influence the target. At the very least, you now have his full attention

boon.description: While this card is recharging you target adds to all Social actions with you as a target

chaosStar.description: Funny thing. Your target also knows the person, but they've never heard your name mentioned. If you use Guile for the check, gain the Cowed condition while this card is recharging

challenge.description: Special: This action may only be made against each individual target once per act. If you do not really know the subject of your name-drop, add to the check and use Guile (Fel) vs. Target Intuition (Int) instead.
